categories.label: Equipment
categories.blurb: Weapons, armour, and every worn-slot item tracked in the database.

categories.blurb: Arrows, bolts, darts, javelins, cannonballs, and thrown ammunition.

categories.label: Drops

categories.blurb: Ores, logs, fish, and raw gathering resources.
